Title: Verify Person Class Initialization
Test Data:
- name: John Doe
- age: 30
- gender: Male
Test Steps: 1. Create a new instance of the Person class with the given name, age, and gender.
Expected Result: - The Person object is created successfully with the specified attributes.

Title: Verify Person Class Getter Methods
Preconditions: A Person object is created with name: John Doe, age: 30, gender: Male
Test Steps:
1. Call getName() method on the Person object.
2. Call getAge() method on the Person object.
3. Call getGender() method on the Person object.
Expected Result:
- getName() returns "John Doe"
- getAge() returns 30
- getGender() returns "Male"

Title: Verify Person Class Setter Methods
Preconditions: A Person object is created with name: John Doe, age: 30, gender: Male
Test Steps:
1. Call setAge(newAge) method on the Person object.
2. Call setGender(newGender) method on the Person object.
3. Call getAge() method on the Person object.
4. Call getGender() method on the Person object.
Expected Result:
- getAge() returns 35
- getGender() returns "Female"

Title: Verify Map Class Initialization
Test Steps: 1. Create a new instance of the Map class.
Expected Result: - The Map object is created successfully.

Title: Verify Map Class Add Element Method
Test Steps: 1. Call addElement(key, value) method on the Map object.
Expected Result: - The element is added to the map successfully.

Title: Verify Map Class Remove Element Method
Preconditions: A Map object is created with an element added
Test Steps: 1. Call removeElement(key) method on the Map object.
Expected Result: - The element is removed from the map successfully.

Title: Verify Map Class Check Element Method
Preconditions: A Map object is created with an element added
Test Steps: 1. Call checkElement(key) method on the Map object.
Expected Result: - The method returns true if the element exists, false otherwise.

Title: Verify Map Class Size Method
Preconditions: A Map object is created with one element added
Test Steps: 1. Call getSize() method on the Map object.
Expected Result: - The method returns 1.

Title: Verify Initial State Transition to Suggestion Screen
Test Steps:
1. Start from the initial state (Mappa iniziale).
2. Transition to the suggestion screen (Schermata suggerimento).
Expected Result: - The transition from Mappa iniziale to Schermata suggerimento is successful.

Title: Verify Suggestion Screen Transition Back to Initial State
Preconditions: The system is in the suggestion screen state (Schermata suggerimento).
Test Steps: 1. Transition back to the initial state (Mappa iniziale).
Expected Result: - The transition from Schermata suggerimento to Mappa iniziale is successful.

Title: Verify User Interaction with MainActivity
Test Steps:
1. User initiates MainActivity.
2. MainActivity sends the activity to the server.
3. Server receives the activity.
Expected Result: - The activity is initiated by the user and received by the server successfully.

Title: Verify User Interaction with LoadCountries Activity
Test Steps:
1. User initiates LoadCountries activity.
2. LoadCountries activity processes the request.
Expected Result: - The LoadCountries activity processes the request successfully.

Title: Verify User Interaction with UpdateAppWidget
Test Steps:
1. User interacts with Provider.
2. User interacts with UpdateAppWidget.
3. User interacts with UpdateWidget.
Expected Result: - The user interaction with Provider and UpdateAppWidget results in successful updates to the application widget.

Title: Verify User Interaction with MapActivity and MapView
Test Steps:
1. User initiates MapActivity.
2. MapActivity refreshes MapView.
3. MapActivity sends data to AirVisualAPI.
Expected Result: - The user interaction with MapActivity and MapView results in successful data processing and display.

Title: Verify User Interaction with Activity1 and Activity2
Test Steps:
1. User sends a message to Activity1.
2. Activity1 sends a message to Activity2.
Expected Result: - The user interaction with Activity1 and Activity2 results in successful message passing.

Title: Verify User Interaction with Activity1 and Activity2 with Invalid Data
Test Steps:
1. User sends an invalid message to Activity1.
2. Activity1 attempts to send the message to Activity2.
Expected Result: - An error occurs due to the invalid message, and the message is not sent to Activity2.
